train.sentence: The system must handle errors appropriately.

val.sentence: The service must respond suitably to all invalid inputs.
The system must apply encryption where applicable.
Incidents must be resolved in a timely fashion.
The search endpoint must return results within 500ms for 99% of requests.
The service must produce fewer than 5 unhandled exceptions per day.
The form must be intuitive and require no training.
The onboarding flow must deliver a great experience.
Customers must be satisfied after using the support portal.

The queue shall never drop messages.
The sensor module must have an MTBF greater than 10000 hours.
The release must not have any bugs.
